primary_text:
A Brookvale hub open five days a week. Named regenerative farms across NSW. Families collecting food that was on the farm days ago.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. No warehouses, no wholesalers. Food reaches families faster. Farmers keep more.

The model is working. Mid-2026, FarmThru is launching equity crowdfunding on Birchal.

If you believe food should work differently, this is your chance to be part of building it.
headline: A grocery store you can own a piece of
description: FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, launching mid-2026. Join the waitlist. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Warm photo of the Brookvale hub in action -- someone collecting a brown paper bag of produce. Clean, real. Small Birchal badge in corner.
